title: Warehouse Executive (Production Support) | Pioneer | Up to $3.5K + Benefits
description:
• Basic up to $3,500 + AWS + Variable Bonus (VB).

  • $500 per year for wellness/medical/lifestyle.

  • Pioneer (Industrial Zone).

  • 2-week rotating shifts (7:30 AM – 5:00 PM / 7:30 PM – 5:00 AM).

  • Must hold a valid Forklift License.

Job Summary

We are looking for a proactive Warehouse Executive to support day-to-day material flows and storage operations. You will be responsible for the end-to-end movement of parts, from receiving and quality verification to storage and final dispatch to production departments. This role requires hands-on forklift operations and strong coordination with cross-functional teams.

Key Responsibilities

  • Material Flow & Receiving: Manage the receiving and issuance of stocks against shipping documents. Ensure parts are dispatched to the correct departments on time.

  • Forklift Operations: Safely handle unloading/loading of incoming/outgoing goods and transportation of bulky items within the site.

  • Inventory Integrity: Maintain accurate stock records and participate in the company’s annual stock takes.

  • Cross-Functional Coordination: Communicate parts status with team members to meet production needs; coordinate stock arrivals with suppliers and requestors.

  • Safety & Housekeeping: Ensure strict compliance with EHS (Environment, Health, and Safety) requirements and maintain 5S housekeeping standards.

  • Documentation: Record all material movements and hand-offs neatly, accurately, and legibly.

Requirements

  • Completed Secondary level or higher; Nitec in Mechanical Engineering is highly preferred.

  • Must possess a valid Forklift License.

  • Prior experience in a warehouse operations environment is preferred.

  • Basic command of English (speaking and reading) and ability to perform documentation accurately.

  • Must be able to commit to the 2-week rotating shift schedule.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
